title: Festive Childrens Holding DIY Sleigh - Large Xmas Home Decoration Ideal for Small Presents or Stocking Fillers - Kids Christmas Eve Box or Gift Bag
features: Festive Decor: Add a touch of Christmas cheer with this DIY gift sleigh home decoration, perfect for displaying presents. Transform your home into a festive wonderland with this DIY Christmas Xmas Festive Gift Sleigh Christmas Home Decor.

Dimensions: Crafted with care, this charming sleigh serves as an enchanting display for small presents during the holiday season. Measuring 28 x 52 x 20 cm (approximately), it offers ample space for small gifts and festive items.

Easy Assembly: Embrace the magic of Christmas with this delightful DIY project. This 3D pop-up decoration comes with 2 side supports, 1 base, 1 front support, and 1 back support for straightforward assembly.

Versatile Design: Whether nestled under the tree or adorning a tabletop, this sleigh adds a touch of whimsy and holiday cheer to your decor. The sleigh's design allows for creative customisation, making it a unique addition to your holiday decor.
Ideal Gift: Consider this DIY Christmas sleigh as a thoughtful present for loved ones who appreciate handmade crafts and festive decorations.
